## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No secrets committed (check `git diff` for API keys, passwords, tokens)
- [ ] If adding an ingest source: documented in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] If changing the DB schema: migration documented in PR description
